nits: DELETE realtime payload only contains the primary key by default (no REPLICA IDENTITY FULL on public.approvals) — production DELETE frames will be {op:'DELETE', approval:{id}} only; the test's full-row mock gives false confidence about the prod payload but does not contradict the G.1 spec
Channel leak window between supabase.subscribe() and entering the Promise<void> block if writeSSE throws — bounded per-connection, matches the existing cloud-runs SSE pattern
Hydrate LIMIT 200 silently truncates with no client-side indicator; acceptable for current scale
reviewer: opus-4.7 adversarial pass via Agent tool
